---
title: "CV Ocean Twin"
description: "A digital-twin dashboard for ocean dynamics around the Cabo Verde archipelago — sea-surface temperature, marine heatwaves and thermal fronts."
date: "2025-03-01"
image: thumbnail.jpg
categories: [App, Shiny, Remote Sensing, Ocean]
---

## About

**Cabo Verde Ocean Twin** is an interactive Shiny dashboard that turns satellite-derived
ocean data into an explorable digital twin of the waters around the Cabo Verde archipelago.
It brings together sea-surface temperature (SST) and its anomalies, marine heatwave metrics
(duration, intensity and cumulative thermal stress), thermal fronts, and a coastal-versus-offshore
zonation — with maps, seasonal cycles and time series to make ocean variability and warming
trends visible at a glance.

## Live Demo

```{=html}
<iframe src="https://anayananayana.shinyapps.io/CVOceanTwin/"
        width="100%" height="650" style="border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:8px;">
</iframe>
```

[Open app in new tab](https://anayananayana.shinyapps.io/CVOceanTwin/){.btn .btn-primary}

## Stack

[R]{.badge-skill} [Shiny]{.badge-skill} [terra]{.badge-skill} [leaflet]{.badge-skill} [Remote Sensing]{.badge-skill}
